summary: Completed testing of navbar fixes, new Case Studies page, and Blog page functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend navigation and new pages working correctly with minor contact form interaction issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Service selection not persisting properly in dropdown - shows validation error even after selection

integration_issues.issue: Service dropdown selection state not properly maintained, causing form validation to fail

passed_tests: Navbar properly centered with all required links (Services, Case Studies, Pricing, Blog, Contact, Start Project)
Case Studies page accessible at /case-studies with all 3 projects (Polluxkart, Expense Splitter, API Gateway)
Blog page accessible at /blog with category filters and 6+ articles
CaseStudiesSection correctly removed from home page
All backend APIs functioning perfectly (POST /api/contact working)
Contact form fields fillable and validation working
All contact form backend integration verified via API testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form service dropdown selection state - the selection is not persisting properly causing form validation to fail even when a service is selected. The backend API works perfectly, this is a frontend state management issue.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor contact form dropdown issue)
